prompts.prompt:
Task: Read-only API exploration

        Objective: Inspect the P367 Big Lotto no-DB evidence API facade and summarize available functions and output shapes for handoff use.

        Constraints: No DB open/write. No adapter calls. No new scoring. No deploy. No betting advice. No future prediction guarantee. Historical descriptive evidence only. No production registry import. No blended leaderboard. Shape-only and blocked targets remain excluded.

        Allowed actions:
        - Run `python3 -m recovered_strategies.biglotto.no_db_evidence_api --help`.
- Use only facade calls that read committed artifacts.
- Report function names, arguments, and output schemas.

        Stop if the task would require DB access, adapter execution, new scoring, deploy, force operations, betting advice, or future-performance claims.
prompts.title: Read-only API exploration

prompts.prompt:
Task: No-DB artifact audit

        Objective: Check that required P367/P368 evidence artifacts exist, parse, and have stable SHA256 values.

        Constraints: No DB open/write. No adapter calls. No new scoring. No deploy. No betting advice. No future prediction guarantee. Historical descriptive evidence only. No production registry import. No blended leaderboard. Shape-only and blocked targets remain excluded.

        Allowed actions:
        - Read JSON and CSV artifacts with stdlib parsers.
- Compare manifest paths and source SHA256 values.
- Report only historical artifact availability and parse status.

        Stop if the task would require DB access, adapter execution, new scoring, deploy, force operations, betting advice, or future-performance claims.
prompts.title: No-DB artifact audit

prompts.prompt:
Task: No-DB dashboard smoke check

        Objective: Smoke check committed dashboard and explorer artifacts without importing production registries or executing adapters.

        Constraints: No DB open/write. No adapter calls. No new scoring. No deploy. No betting advice. No future prediction guarantee. Historical descriptive evidence only. No production registry import. No blended leaderboard. Shape-only and blocked targets remain excluded.

        Allowed actions:
        - Inspect committed HTML/JSON/CSV artifacts under `artifacts/`.
- Confirm static links and evidence tables are present.
- Avoid runtime services and DB-backed routes.

        Stop if the task would require DB access, adapter execution, new scoring, deploy, force operations, betting advice, or future-performance claims.
prompts.title: No-DB dashboard smoke check

prompts.prompt:
Task: No-DB compatibility revalidation

        Objective: Revalidate P367 API compatibility with P368 golden snapshots and report any contract drift.

        Constraints: No DB open/write. No adapter calls. No new scoring. No deploy. No betting advice. No future prediction guarantee. Historical descriptive evidence only. No production registry import. No blended leaderboard. Shape-only and blocked targets remain excluded.

        Allowed actions:
        - Run `python3 -m recovered_strategies.biglotto.no_db_evidence_api_snapshots --validate`.
- Inspect compatibility matrix rows for incompatible entries.
- Inspect contract drift rows for FAIL status.

        Stop if the task would require DB access, adapter execution, new scoring, deploy, force operations, betting advice, or future-performance claims.
prompts.title: No-DB compatibility revalidation

prompts.prompt:
Task: No-DB CLI usage examples

        Objective: Generate safe local CLI examples for future workers using the P367/P368 evidence API only.

        Constraints: No DB open/write. No adapter calls. No new scoring. No deploy. No betting advice. No future prediction guarantee. Historical descriptive evidence only. No production registry import. No blended leaderboard. Shape-only and blocked targets remain excluded.

        Allowed actions:
        - Use `--list-adapters`, `--get-adapter`, `--compact-shortlist`, and `--validate` examples.
- Label outputs as historical descriptive evidence.
- Include no-betting and no-future-prediction disclaimers.

        Stop if the task would require DB access, adapter execution, new scoring, deploy, force operations, betting advice, or future-performance claims.
prompts.title: No-DB CLI usage examples
